scope: slugify — URL slug utility (fx-001-review-target fixture, src/slugify.js)

reuseCandidates.notes: Pure, dependency-free: lowercases, trims, collapses non-alphanumeric runs to a single hyphen, strips edge hyphens, caps length (default 60). No I/O, no global state.

integrationPoints.notes: Sole export; consumers require('./slugify') and receive the bare function value (no named/default namespace).

touchList.reason: Entire feature surface is one file; any extension is an in-place edit to slugify.
touchList.caveat: FROZEN benchmark fixture with intentional seeded imperfections — do not modify the fixture itself.

conventions.exemplar: ES5 idioms: var, function declaration, chained .replace(); no const/let/arrow
maxLen = maxLen || 60 (not an ES6 default parameter)

dependencySubgraph.note: Zero require/import statements (src/slugify.js:1); dependency subgraph is empty. dependencyCompleteness vacuous-passes at 1.0.

priorArt.note: Frozen deep-loop behavior-benchmark fixture; src/slugify.js carries intentional seeded imperfections that must never be fixed.
Toy intent docs; tasks.md claims 'Input validation complete' — contradicted by the code (see gaps).

gaps.summary: Length cap slices AFTER edge-hyphen strip (line 21), so a cut on a hyphen boundary leaves a trailing '-' — violates spec.md requirements 4 & 5.
Only number is stringified; null/undefined/object/boolean throw TypeError at toLowerCase (line 15). Contradicts tasks.md 'Input validation complete'.
maxLen || 60 coerces falsy 0 to 60 and does not guard a negative maxLen.
Non-ASCII/accented chars dropped, not transliterated ('Café' -> 'caf'); limits multilingual reuse.
All-non-alphanumeric input returns ''; spec defines no empty-slug behavior — open contract question.

contradictions.explanation: 4 signature-field divergences flagged by the reducer are phrasing/collapse artifacts of coarse (path,symbol,kind) unit identity on a single-function file, NOT semantic contract conflicts. Both seats agreed on substance.
